themes.name: WhiteSur macOS
themes.description: macOS Big Sur / Monterey look with dark mode and purple accent. Includes GDM, wallpapers, and Firefox theme.

themes.name: Colloid Material
themes.description: Clean Material Design theme with dark mode and purple accent. Supports Nord, Dracula, Catppuccin colorschemes.

themes.name: Fluent Win11
themes.description: Windows 11 Fluent Design with dark mode and purple accent. Matching icons and cursors by vinceliuice.

themes.name: Win11
themes.description: Windows 11 theme by yeyushengfan258. Dark mode with purple accent and Fluent cursors.

themes.name: We10X Win10
themes.description: Windows 10 theme by yeyushengfan258. Dark mode with purple accent and Fluent cursors.

themes.name: Orchis Material
themes.description: Material Design theme with rounded corners and purple accent. Paired with Tela icons and Graphite cursors.

themes.name: Graphite Minimal
themes.description: Minimalist flat theme with purple accent. Includes GDM theme, Tela icons, and Graphite cursors.

themes.name: Lavanda Purple
themes.description: Elegant theme with native purple palette. Inherently purple — no accent flag needed. Paired with Tela icons.

themes.name: Catppuccin Mocha
themes.description: Warm, soothing pastel dark theme beloved by developers. Catppuccin icons and mauve cursors.
